Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    ;
    11	
    12	postfixExpression
    13	    :   primaryExpression  
    14	    ;
    15	
    16	unaryExpression
    17	    :
    18	    (postfixExpression
    19	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    20	    )
    21	    ;
    22	
    23	unaryOperator
    24	    :   Plus | Minus
    25	    ;
    26	
    27	additiveExpression
    28	    :   unaryExpression ((Plus|Minus) unaryExpression)*
    29	    ;
    30	
    31	
    32	assignmentExpression
    33	    :   additiveExpression
    34	    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    35	    ;
    36	
    37	expression
    38	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    39	    ;
    40	
    41	
    42	declaration
    43	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    44	    ;
    45	
    46	declarationSpecifiers
    47	    :   declarationSpecifier+
    48	    ;
    49	
    50	declarationSpecifier
    51	    :   typeSpecifier
    52	    ;
    53	
    54	initDeclaratorList
    55	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
    56	    ;
    57	
    58	initDeclarator
    59	    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
    60	    ;
    61	
    62	
    63	typeSpecifier
    64	    :   Int
    65	    ;
    66	
    67	
    68	declarator
    69	    :   directDeclarator
    70	    ;
    71	
    72	directDeclarator
    73	    :   Identifier
    74	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    75	    ;
    76	
    77	identifierList
    78	    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
    79	    ;
    80	
    81	initializer
    82	    :   assignmentExpression
    83	    |   LeftBrace initializerList? Comma? RightBrace
    84	    ;
    85	
    86	initializerList
    87	    // :   designation? initializer (Comma designation? initializer)*
    88	    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
    89	    ;
    90	
    91	statement
    92	    :   compoundStatement
    93	    |   expressionStatement
    94	    |   jumpStatement
    95	    ;
    96	
    97	compoundStatement
    98	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
    99	    ;
   100
